entry.title: Re: Eclipse IDE (SAP BW/HANA) Problems In Linux
entry.content: I'm sorry, but what exactly was the error after you set the parameter in eclipse.ini? The screenshot just shows the ini file and the commenged vmargs parameter.

entry.title: Determine number of times each HANA view has been executed, and by whom?
entry.content: I need to know the number of times each view in my HANA system has been executed over the last few months. I also need to know which users have executed those views. Is that possible? Does auditing need to be set up to obtain those metrics? If so, can someone direct me to practical examples? Best Practices and Recommendations for Creating Audit Policies is interesting but none of the examples seems to apply to what I'm trying to accomplish.

entry.title: Re: Streamline Data Migration from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA: Selective Data Transition with Time-Slice
entry.content:
Thanks @matthiasstegmue 

Are there plans to include SAP Business Transformation Center's Selective Data Transition into the Early SAP Adopter Program ? The feature and its enhancements are quite recents, and would reassure both Partners and Customers having SAP helping them in case of unexpected issues

Also have there been many customers who actually went Live, in Production on S/4HANA using  SAP Business Transformation Center's Selective Data Transition  ?

entry.title: Re: Migration of Interview Scheduling using Microsoft Outlook Integration to Work Tech
entry.content:
Hi @mfpabon!

I reposted your Q to the SuccessFactors Recruiting User Group. Hopefully we'll get better response there! 🙂

https://community.sap.com/t5/sap-successfactors-recruiting-user-group/repost-from-mfpabon-challenges-migrating-interview-scheduling-to-work-tech/m-p/14022842#M982

Thanks!
Tara

entry.title: Re: Is it mandatory to have a partner for a lift and shif...
entry.content: If you are asking this question it means that you definitely need a Partner.

entry.title: DCD1 condition type is getting determined for US company codes
entry.content:
Hello Team,

 

DCD1 ( Cash Discount ) condition type is getting determined for US company codes based on the payment maintained in the preliminary billing document or the payment terms in the customer master.

entry.title: Re: SAP S/4HANA Supply Chain for Transportation Management: Freight Cost Allocation to Material Valu
entry.content:
Hi Atul

Thank you for a good blog post. I do have a couple of questions regarding the process you describe at the beginning of the blog. The process ends with this step:

In parallel (with integration to the SAP S/4HANA Settlement Management integration below accounting entries are also created (provided the setup is correctly done):

Debit Material

Credit Freight Clearing

What happens to the Credit items on the Freight Clearing account? Are there further steps in the process creating a Debit entry on the Freight Clearing account. Or will it just accumulate over time. The invoice from the carrier seems to be posted on the GR/IR account used for material reciepts and invoices. So the invoice is clearing the freight service offset posting on the GR/IR account.

And what is the purpose of the service acceptance document where you debit a Freight cost account?
In your example the cost are also posted to the stock accounts in your balance sheet. So it seems to be double up.

Best regards

Claus Møller Jensen

entry.title: Re: DCD1 condition type is getting determined for US company codes
entry.content: DCD1 ( Cash Discount ) condition type is not getting determined for US company codes based on the payment maintained in the preliminary billing document or the payment terms in the customer master.

entry.title: Re: Microsoft Outlook and Teams Integration for Interview Scheduling
entry.content:
Hi @mfpabon,

Niel at SAP Support told me just today on my ticket that no, you do not need different credentials for Preview vs Production.

I have reached out internally about the first inquiry since I can't find information about it in our docs including implementation guide. I already received an [answer] and confirmed that using the same MS exchange credentials in your Preview and Production should not cause a problem in your configuration. Both should work fine, nevertheless, I think the consequence will be the possibility of your employees getting emails from your Preview instance.

Hope that helps!
Tara

entry.title: Projected stock is not being generated within the Location Product Substitution Set-up
entry.content:
Hi everyone,
I am encountering an issue with the location product substitution functionality in SAP IBP and would appreciate your insights.


Setup details:
Infinite heuristic
Discontinuation with use-up (including SOFTSTOP and HARDSTOP)
When I run an application job, the substitution behaves correctly in most aspects:
When there is no stock for the old product, the system stops planning for it (projected stock becomes empty from that period onwards).
The Location-Product-Substitution Supply key figure for the new product are filled with the demand from the old product.


The issue:
Projected stock at the new product is not being generated.


If there is stock on hand for the new product, it gets consumed over several months, and I can see the projected stock accordingly. However, once the stock is used-up, projected stock remains empty.
The same happens if there is no initial stock on hand for the new product—projected stock just is not being generated.


Does anyone know why this might be happening and how to adjust the system to generate projected stock correctly? Am I missing a configuration or master data setup?


I’ve attached screenshots for reference.

Thanks a lot in advance for your help!

entry.title: Re: How to show the Story Filter value in a Textbox in SAC?
entry.content: @Ivan_CThis works! Thanks!

entry.title: Re: FSM can be deploy in On Premie releases
entry.content: Thaks for your informatión.

entry.title: Re: 🇮🇳 SAP CodeJam ABAP: SAP BTP, ABAP Environment & RAP (Chennai, India)
entry.content: I'm very much interested. Looking forward for your response.... Thanks in advance

entry.title: Re: Is there any way to sync an all-Page filter with an Input_Control filter?
entry.content:
@Ivan_C- Do you have any solutions for this? I have messaged the scenario to you as well! Would be great if you could help!

Thanks,
Sagnik

entry.title: Re: SAP CPQ - Bring interactive, real-time 3D Product Configuration from Expivi
entry.content:
Hello Yogananda, 

Are there any prerequisites for integrating Expivi with SAP CPQ? We are currently using SAP CPQ alongside SAP Sales Cloud. Is the 3D configurator can run without SAP Commerce Cloud? 

Thank you,

entry.title: how to restrict serial numbers at plant level in ewm
entry.content:
Hi All,

Our requirement is, two plants are linked to one EWM warehouse(MNCH). Material ABCD123 is available in two plants (1000 and 2000) with different serial numbers in the warehouse. Delivery is created for 1000 plant. Expectation is, while picking user scans the serial numbers and system should allow to pick serial number belongs to 1000 plant only but not 2000. Now it is allowing to pick the serial numbers from both the plant. How to restrict the serial numbers to pick only from that particular plant.

Please suggest.

Thanks in advance!

Regards,

Sachin.

entry.title: Re: Automatic creation for Purchase Requisitions for Service
entry.content:
Hi @Wesley89,
Could you please explain more about the requirement?
In-general as per the PR requirement:
If it is for one time - we may go for PO creation by finding relevant vendor.
If it is for multiple times - we may go for contract/scheduling agreement creation.


If the PR to be created on monthly basis - get it create a custom program with technical team(ABAP) with reference to a custom table (where PR relevant data can be entered).
Schedule that PR custom program as a background with monthly period.

entry.title: How to Mass Delete Planned Orders for Multiple Materials at one time
entry.content: I am working in SAP RP1 and trying to find a way to delete multiple Planned orders for multiple materials at one time.  Any suggestions?

entry.title: Re: Migration to SAP S/4HANA Transportation Management
entry.content:
On a side car deployment where Core is on S4Hana (On Premise) and TM is on S4 Private cloud, how data will be transferred? will it be still DRF or any other integration method require in this deployment case. 

Also how the transactional data will be transferred from S4Hana Core (On Premise) to TM (S4Hana private cloud).

Regards

entry.title: fill Component list from maintenance plans work orders
entry.content:
Hello all,

I Need some help Please?

I am looking for a way to be able to have my components tab already filled out with parts required to completed the task for all of my maintenance work orders created by a certain maintenance plan.

Many Thanks!

entry.title: Store file content into a Z table
entry.content:
Hello,

One of our external partner is sending a flat file into our SAP system's folder, our custom prog is reading the file and creating the POs in SAP, well, but we want to make sure that the external partner should not send the same file again, want to avoid duplicating. External Partner is not accepting to provide any kind of Identifier or unique ID or GUID or time stamp inside the file so that our custom prog validate the duplication, pls. let us know how to avoid the duplication or processing the same file again? What about our custom prog will store all the file content in a Z table after converting it into binary data (like SAP stores long texts) so every single time our custom prog will validate current file content with stored content in the Z table, our system is unicode enabled / ECC?

Thank you

entry.title: Re: How to implement "readonly : update" for draft instances
entry.content:
Hi all,

IMHO this is yet another example for the chatty nature of RAP.  RAP should IMHO more follow a convention over configuration approach.

What else could be ment by default with "field ( readonly : update ) AgencyId;" for a draft enabled entity than editable for a freshly created draft entry until the draft is persisted and readonly thereafter?

While it is of cource nice that we can achieve this with 20 lines of code (the 39 lines above contain some empty lines and code could be a bit more dense through the use of VALUE constructors), I would want this without any additional line...

Regards,

  Wolfgang

entry.title: Hi All - Where can i find a list of training and Certification courses for Business Users?
Re: SAP CPQ - Bring interactive, real-time 3D Product Configuration from Expivi
entry.content:
@MehmetErcomert 

There are no pre-requisities for integrating with Expivi with SAP CPQ. you will have to design with RD templates according to your need. 3D Configurator can run without SAP CommerceCloud

entry.title: The email address control does not recognise an incorrect format as an error - Career site - Rec
entry.content:
The email address control does not recognize an incorrect format as an error. The client has a need of covering the situation when an email does not have the correct format - show the appropriate error message (like it works to First name and Last name fields).

We need it to cover WCAG-complaince issues

SAP SuccessFactors Recruiting

entry.title: Seeking Eclipse ADT Equivalent to SE37's "Save Parameters as Test Data" Feature
entry.content:
Hi SAP Community,

I'm currently working with Eclipse ADT and am missing a feature that was available in the older SE37 transaction (ABAP Workbench).

Specifically, I'm looking for a way to save parameter values from an ABAP program or function module as test data. This functionality allowed me to easily create predefined sets of input parameters for testing purposes.

Does anyone know of any equivalent features or plugins within Eclipse ADT that can achieve this? Any suggestions or workarounds would be greatly appreciated!

entry.title: Re: Store file content into a Z table
entry.content: Wouldn't checking the PO # itself be sufficient to identify duplication?

entry.title: Are we able to send one employee's performance review to multiple managers?
entry.content: I have an employee that works for 2 different managers. Is it possible to send 1 review to both managers or do I set up 2 different reviews?

All the best

Es esto posible?

entry.title: Re: Store file content into a Z table

The input file doesn't have it any such unique number, file has say for example, it has MATNR, QTY., PRICE, PLANT etc.

entry.title: Re: Variable Pay - Individual Goal rating from Performanc...
entry.content:
Hi @glequell 

Yes both are possible. The integration is always from PM to VP and never from GM to VP directly so in order to retrieve a goal and its "achievement %" field into VP you must first pull the goal into a performance form and then set map VP to retrieve it from the right section of the PM form as below:

 

 

 

Rating from the performance form: 

(from this blog)

 

Rating from the Goal "achievement" field: 

(From this blog)

 

All the best,

Xavier

entry.title: Details: com.sap.aii.utilxi.misc.api.BaseRuntimeException; Character reference "&#, BaseRuntimeExce
entry.content:
HI Experts,

 

I do have a Scenario RFC to REST , when data is been pushed from SAP to PO System , i am facing error in PO monitoring 

 

Error :  Details: com.sap.aii.utilxi.misc.api.BaseRuntimeException; Character reference "&#, BaseRuntimeException: Character reference "&#, BaseRuntimeException: Character reference "&#, org.xml.sax.SAXParseException; lineNumber: 1; columnNumber: 201; Character reference "&#

However this the data that sent from SAP for these fields

    "remark": "Tested from Postman",

    "rejectReason": "Not rejected Test Postman"

 

NOTE : Total we have 8 fields, data is in payload is displaying as expected .Only for the above mentioned fields , payload is showing as

 


<REJECTREASON>N�o�t� �r�e�j�e�c�t�e�d� �T�e�s�t� �P�o�s�t�m�a�n</REJECTREASON>
<REMARK>T�e�s�t�e�d� �f�r�o�m� �P�o�s�t�m�a�n</REMARK>

 

 

Can someone please help me on this .

entry.title: Re: I cannot see the list of which folders and stories a...
entry.content:
Hi @AtillaCemYildizJ,

1. If you want check which user have access to folders story or model you can check by Go in System>Overview>Security 

And select object you want check either it's model,story, folder, application

 2. If you want to check user role 

Go to Security> User> role are mentioned in front of user name 

3. You can check user activity as well through security tab 

 

Kindly upvote/accept solution if you find it helpful

Thanks.

entry.title: Re: Feature Request: Flow Function for Opening Apple Subs...
entry.content:
@marihirvi  Is there any chance that SAP Build App will gain this feature in the future?

Thanks in advance for your feedback!

entry.title: Re: 2H 2024 Release - Automatic import of OCN items
entry.content: I don't have a confirmed answer but am also interested in the solution. We are in the same situation - we are implementing LinkedIn Learning OCN, and only want to import the items in our supported locales (currently only English).

entry.title: Re: Building a Serial Number Tracker Report for Production Materials in SAP S/4HANA Cloud
entry.content:
Hello,

In case anyone encounters this post, there is a new Fiori App Serial Number History / F7368

Which has comparable functionality and alleviates the need for a custom report.

entry.title: NF-e Technical Note 2018.005 - Technical Responsible
entry.content:
Part of the NT 2018 - 005 v1.04 we are implementing the changes for SEFAZ PR which is to inform CSRT and hashCSRT.
According to SAP on OSS note 2780735, SAP will provide CSRT only for customer with is using Document Report and Compliance(DRC cloud solution). What about the old GRC NFE 10.0? (SAP Electronic Invoicing for Brazil 10.0). SAP should provide CSRT as well or should we maintain our own CNPJ as solution provider? 

Some of you have a similiar issue using GRC NFe ?

entry.title: Re: MEASUREMENT POINT MAINTENANCE PLAN DUE BASED ON LAST...
entry.content:
Try this and let me know if it works out for you:

  1. Set the shift factors on the maintenance plan.
  2. The maintenance plan should be setup to create a PM order
  3. Call the maintenance plan schedule
  4. While TECO the order, there is a popup to enter Reference Date and time. There is also a button to create measurement documents. Enter the relevant measurement.
  5. Review the maintenance plan schedule. It should be adjusted based on the shift factor and the newly created measurement document.

entry.title: Re: Restrict Delete Facts in Modeler but allow user to pl...
entry.content:
Hi @BhaktiBagkar,

You can do this by Custom Access 

1. Go to model

2. Click on Share model option 

3. Select Custom options 

4. Select Edit only as shown below & save.

 

Kindly upvote if you find it helpful.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Consuming CDS View Entities Using ODBC-Based Client Tools
entry.content:
Dear @Frank-Martin ,

we try to replicate the concept but with an S//4HANA On Premise system. All is good until we try to access the SQL Services (both custom and /sap/bc/sql/sql1/sap/s_privileged as described in the documentation).

We could not find any service in SICF under this path /sap/bc/sql/sql1/ and we cannot access our Z SQL service neither also we could see SQL services in SE80. It is like the services do not generate any entry in SICF.

Are we missing a step ? 

Many thanks !

SAP HANA Cloud, SAP HANA database  SAP S/4HANA

entry.title: SAP IBP Keyfigure value for last day of the month
entry.content:
Hi experts!

 

I'd like to set a keyfigure calculation to define a value for the last day of the month.

Let's say:

If 'last day of the month', '1', '2'.

Is there any condition to test the period as last day of the month?

 

Thanks a lot!

Best regards!

 

Victor

entry.title: Re: Splitting Strings in SuccessFactors Business Rule
entry.content: Really cool, thanks for sharing !

entry.title: Re: Use of elements not permitted in CDS view Data Defini...
entry.content:
Hi @mpredolim 

I found this SAP note https://me.sap.com/notes/3573372/E There SAP explains this is a known bug. The note mentions bug will be fixed on March 1st-2nd. It also suggests a workaround.

In my case, I noticed I can read the tables using an Abap class + Eclipse Debugger.

Regards.

entry.title: Re: Creating an L3-L8 Approval Hierarchy
entry.content:
Hi @Annie3 

Sorry I was on parental leave when you posted this question and unfortunately my colleagues didn't pick up on it.

We usually don't recommend adding too many compensation forms route map steps (we recommend max 2 manager steps). If you want additional approvers we recommend using the Executive review based on RBP and leverage the new 2H 2024 "Exec review based on route step" feature to trigger permissions automatically based on route steps. 

Thanks a lot !

Xavier

entry.title: Re: SAP TM in private cloud
entry.content: Hi, Did you get answer of this

entry.title: Re: Use of elements not permitted in CDS view Data Defini...
entry.content:
Hi @DiegoValdivia. Thanks for the input.

I already saw this note and for me the only solution is wait until SAP fix the issue.

Regards,
Mauricio Predolim

entry.title: Re: SAP Analytics Cloud - Threshold Visualization Issue
entry.content: https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/applying-thresholds-on-sac-charts-tables-and-addressing-common-issues/ba-p/13954344

entry.title: Re: Seeking Eclipse ADT Equivalent to SE37's "Save Parameters as Test Data" Feature
entry.content: You are talking about the ADT debugger versus SAP GUI debugger. There are lots of things in the backend debugger which are not available in the ADT debugger (current situation after 10 years of ADT Debugger). Developers switch between the two debuggers. If you're experienced in Java, you might develop the tool in Eclipse ADT via the ADT SDK/ABAP.

entry.title: Re: function module return the dates between two periods
entry.content: It's pure ABAP, you don't need external code to add 1, to extract substring month and test 12.

entry.title: 🌟SAP ALM Summit LAC 2025 🌟
entry.content:
[Clientes SAP]

🌟SAP ALM Summit LAC 2025 🌟

É com grande entusiasmo que anunciamos o SAP ALM Summit LAC 2025, que acontecerá nos dias 31 de março e 1 de abril no prestigioso SAP Business Campus, localizado em São Paulo, capital.

Prepare-se para dois dias de insights valiosos, trocas de experiências e networking com especialistas da indústria e líderes de pensamento. Teremos palestras inspiradoras, sessões interativas e workshops práticos que irão capacitar você e sua equipe a maximizar o valor das soluções SAP ALM.

Não perca a chance de fazer parte desta experiência enriquecedora!

Para mais informações e para garantir seu lugar, visite nosso site oficial para registro: https://events.sap.com/sap-alm-summit-lac-2025/en/home

Estamos ansiosos para recebê-los em São Paulo para um evento que promete transformar e inspirar! ✨

entry.title: Re: Migration Cockpit: Archived migrated data should be m...
entry.content:
Hi, @HeWag!

Specifically through the Migration Cockpit, we don't have any options to delete, revert or archive migrated data. This is mentioned in the KBA below:

  • 2812591 - Migration Cockpit: Not possible to reverse data migrated

The resolution of the KBA explains though that, since the app uses the business APIs to upload the data to the system, if the business area of the BAPI has an alternative to delete data, then it's possible that the migrated data can be deleted. For that, you can check the SAP Fiori Apps Reference Library.

Best regards,
Caio

entry.title: Re: SAP Event Mesh | End To End Tutorial with Cloud Platform Integration
entry.content: Cloud you please elaborate how to trigger the product data from S/4 to Eventmesh and then CPI.

entry.title: Re: How to consume RAP entity from other ABAP System?
entry.content: You can create service definition and service binding as odata. Then you should be able to  call from remote system.

entry.title: Re: Store file content into a Z table
entry.content: Sounds like a perfect case for pushing back because the sender should have some way to identify the PO(s) for reconciliation purposes.

entry.title: Re: SAP Build Process Automation – SMTP Mail Destination using Microsoft 365 email provider
entry.content:
Hi Karthikeyan,

Looking forward to the blog covering OAuth2ClientCredentials.

 

Thanks,

Puneet

entry.title: Re: Store file content into a Z table
entry.content: I agree with you, our management tried max to do that but external partner saying for some reason they dont want to make any change

entry.title: Some parallelly-processed IDocs remain 64
entry.content:
Please skip this question, I'm posting an answer. Even after years of ABAP, I sometimes forget to verify the essential things.

I'm processing inbound IDocs via BD20/RBDAPP01, in parallel mode, with packages of 5 IDocs. Sometimes, all the IDocs of one package remain in status 64 (to be processed), and no error is shown in BD20. It seemed to be random. Running BD20 again processed successfully these remaining IDocs.

I did some debug and couldn't find the reason. Debug seems preventing the bug to happen.

I ran BD20 with the option "Wait end of processing", and still IDocs remain in status 64, but no error.

What could be the issue?

My system: ABAP 7.40 SP08.

entry.title: Re: Some parallelly-processed IDocs remain 64
entry.content:
Just look at the short dumps in ST22.

If there's a short dump, all the IDocs of the package remain in status 64.

An intermittent error, which doesn't happen in debug, may be due to a lock issue. A short dump might indicate a deadlock.

NB: for information, even running BD20 with the option "Wait end of processing" doesn't detect the short dump, there is no message at all. Here's the code in ABAP 7.40 SP08 which doesn't do anything special if a short dump happens (system_failure):

entry.title: Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent, failed to load sap/f/FlexibleColumnLayoutData.js
entry.content:
I am getting the following error when trying to run my FIORI application on the BTP launchpad.

 Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent #zfi_PptoUtilizado-Display - failed to load 'sap/f/FlexibleColumnLayoutData.js' from https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/1.120.26/resources/sap/f/FlexibleColumnLayoutData.js: 404

Here are more from the same message:

The issue is most likely caused by application com.somedomain.zfi_PptoUtilizado. Please create a support incident and assign it to the support component of the respective application. - Failed to load UI5 component with properties: '{

The strange thing is that everything works fine in my WebIDE environment

I have attached some screenshots of the error.

entry.title: Count absences from last year to the current payroll run
entry.content:
I have a complex issue related to absences, i have absence type 0003 and i should count the number of days from this absences from last year to the current payroll,

example : if i run 01.07.2024 to 31.07.2024 , system should count the number of absence days from 01.08.2023 to 31.07.2024

and the next month august 2024 , system should count the days from 01.09.2023 to 31.08.2024 and so on.....

Note: i use negative time 

any support?

entry.title: Re: People Storie positions only of bosses
entry.content: Hi, Can you share more information on this report: who will be using it and for which reasons, what else will you add there except the positions?

entry.title: Re: create report to connect job requisition to position in sap successfactors
entry.content: You need to add 2 Queries: one on Job Requisition and another on Position, then link them in the Designer mode. This is the only way for now

entry.title: Re: Streamline Data Migration from SAP ECC to SAP S/4HANA: Selective Data Transition with Time-Slice
entry.content:
@Necronomicon since it is a SAP Cloud product, hosted on SAP Cloud ALM and already general available for all customers, Early Adopter program doesn't apply here. 

If there are unexpected issues you get usual product support (SAP application component CA-BDT*). Make sure that have gone through the documentation (& troubleshooting) and also checked for notes before opening a ticket. I recommend this page to start with: https://help.sap.com/docs/btc.

Furthermore in order to connect your SAP backend systems to SAP Cloud ALM, I highly recommend our cloud integration automation service which saves a lot of time and guides through the steps 1 by 1: https://help.sap.com/docs/btc/setup-and-administration-guide/using-cloud-integration-automation-service-cias-for-setting-up-sap-business-transformation-center

 

We had the first customer productive migrations (that we are aware of) last year in Q4 already, but we see a high increase of usage recently, so many customers and partners are running migrations using SAP Business Transformation Center.

entry.title: Re: Issue with local annotations in sap bas
entry.content:
@Anjan_3331 

Please select "Project Guides", rather than "All Guides".

entry.title: Re: Text Association in DWC not getting reflected in SAC...
entry.content:
Hi,

 

    In the Analytical view, please remove the Dimension and add it back. The text should display for the Dimension in SAC.

entry.title: Re: Financial Accounting for Hierarchical Setup in Item-Based Services
entry.content:
Hi Artem,

chapeau! Thank you for this fantastic educative blog about financial hierarchy in service management enabling a new revenue recognition method. 

Already subscribed to you - don't want to miss the next blog.

 

Thank you,

Daniel

entry.title: Re: SAP Best Practices for Intelligent Automation for SAP Business ByDesign
entry.content: can someone explain to me or let me know how to download these bots february 2025?

entry.title: Re: Creating a Multi-Item Edit Screen in RAP Similar to SM30
entry.content:
@Ram_peddireddi 

You can enable instance feature control with the below steps:

- Enable feature control on the business key field

field ( features : instance ) DivisionCode;

- Implement the get_instance_features method

METHOD get_instance_features.

    " Check if the entity has been persisted in the DB

    " Make the field editable only if the entity has not been persisted
    result = VALUE #( FOR key IN keys
                          ( %tky                   = key-%tky

                            %field-DivisionCode      = COND #( WHEN is_persisted = abap_false
                                                             THEN if_abap_behv=>fc-f-unrestricted
                                                             ELSE if_abap_behv=>fc-f-read_only )
                          ) ).
  
ENDMETHOD.

Reference: https://help.sap.com/docs/ABAP_PLATFORM_NEW/fc4c71aa50014fd1b43721701471913d/96577d4b75204a59a5401dbf67714fa8.html

entry.title: Re: Failed to load UI5 component for navigation intent, f...
entry.content:
Hi,

please check your SAPUI5-Version, in the screenshot you are loading version 1.120.26, however the API-reference states that the missing control is available since 1.128

https://sapui5.hana.ondemand.com/#/api/sap.f.FlexibleColumnLayoutData

entry.title: Product Allocation (PAL) Reallocation
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

Can Product Allocation PAL be configured to redistribute the quantities of one given period so the PAL can be allocated to the order with the earliest delivery date?

For example

PAL 100 EA for Customer A for February Month is allocated

Order A comes in Customer A for 100 EA with delivery date 03.02.2025 PAL is allocated
Order B comes in Customer A for 100 EA with delivery date 01.02.2025 (earlier del date) Order is PAL blocked

Desired Scenario

Order A Customer A for 100 EA with delivery date 03.02.2025 remove PAL allocation from this order
Order B Customer A for 100 EA with delivery date 01.02.2025 (earlier del date) allocate PAL to this order instead

In short system should re-allocate PAL and ATP to earliest one. I'm not sure how PAL can be set up to function as ATP does.

Thanks

entry.title: Hide Matrix reports in display options
entry.content:
Hello,

The client has no matrix structure, I need to hide "matrix repots only" as an option in display options from the succession org chart view. What are the steps to do this?

entry.title: Re: How to consume RAP entity from other ABAP System?
entry.content: wrap your function in rfc, then your external abap server call this rfc.

entry.title: Re: Store file content into a Z table
entry.content: Enter impasse because from my standpoint I wouldn't budge... no receiver should be generating a PO # - just the suggestion of such steps into the realm of absurd.

entry.title: SAP Developer News February 20th, 2025
entry.content:
DESCRIPTION

Podcast: https://podcast.opensap.info/sap-developers/2025/02/20/sap-developer-news-february-20th-2025/

 Joule for developers, ABAP AI capabilities is here!!!:

  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/joule-speaks-abap/ba-p/14018226
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/the-power-of-joule-for-developers-abap-ai-capabilities/ba-p/14019716
  • https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/unleash-your-inner-abap-rockstar-with-joule-for-developers-abap-ai/ba-p/14019607
  • https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=OwtRsMRLPYU&list=PL6RpkC85SLQAt9lvPw0gF4E3nwbJD0EUe&index=1

ABAPconf YouTube channel content

  • Channel videos https://www.youtube.com/@abapconf/videos

Terraform and SAP BTP news

  • Getting Started with Terraform on SAP BTP https://learning.sap.com/learning-journeys/getting-started-with-terraform-on-sap-btp
  • New Release of the Terraform Exporter for SAP BTP – version 0.3.0-beta1 is out https://www.linkedin.com/pulse/new-release-terraform-exporter-sap-btp-version-out-christian-lechner-leraf/
  • Managing resources on SAP BTP – what tool do I choose? https://qmacro.org/blog/posts/2022/12/12/managing-resources-on-sap-btp-what-tool-do-i-choose/

Writable External Entities:

  • https://help.sap.com/docs/abap-cloud/abap-data-models/writable-external-entities?version=sap_btp

SAP Business Technology Platform Solution Diagram repository update

  • BTP Solution Diagram Repository https://sap.github.io/btp-solution-diagrams/

 

CHAPTER TITLES

0:00 Intro

0:10 Joule for developers, ABAP AI capabilities is here!!!

1:44 ABAPconf YouTube channel content

2:42 Terraform and SAP BTP news

4:01 Writable External Entities

5:02 SAP Business Technology Platform Solution Diagram repository update

 

TRANSCRIPTION

[Intro] This is the SAP developer News for February 20th, 2025.

[Richie] Hello, friends, Rich Heilman here, and of course the big news this week is around the much-anticipated release of Joule for developers' ABAP AI Capabilities. Yes, that's right, folks. The features that I've been showing you for the past couple years in the developer keynotes at SAP TechEd, these features are finally here. Our development teams have been working around the clock to bring you these new Joule capabilities to ABAP development tools in Eclipse or ADT. This week, we've seen several announcement blog posts from ABAP leadership, including Sonia, Alex, and Simona. So please check out these blog posts for more information about the first round of Joule capabilities for ABAP. Also, how you can get started using it today. And of course, more information on the long-term outlook. Also, I'll be publishing some videos, which were created by our development colleagues, showcasing all the great new features, and we'll be putting these videos out on the SAP developer's YouTube channel under a special playlist. The introduction is already out there. I have like 20 more to publish over the next few weeks, so stay tuned. For those who are looking to try this out on BTP ABAP trial, we will have to wait a little bit longer. We are currently looking for a viable solution to make that happen and I'll be sure to update you all on the progress. So stay tuned and bye for now.

[DJ] As you've no doubt heard this week, not least from my good friend and colleague Rich in this very same SAP developer news episode, Joule is now GA for ABAP. If you're an ABAP developer, this is a major milestone. but it's also a great opportunity to make sure your skills are up to date and your knowledge is fresh. Now, the ABAP CONF conference, a great friend and ally of the Code Connect week that takes place annually, has a YouTube channel with plenty of event session replays. Why not head over there and update your knowledge from experts in the field? Joule, of course, is great, but there are also some great gems over on this YouTube channel. See what I did that? I'll be learning.

[DJ] Beyond the SAP BTP cockpit, there are different ways to manage resources on the platform. There's the BTP CLI, of course, there's a family of APIs, and for open declarative management of resources, there's Terraform, and specifically the Terraform provider for SAP BTP. Now, the Terraform provider team have been working hard to create content for you to get started. And in fact, they've recently finished and published a course, getting started with Terraform on SAP BTP. It's around two to three hours, it's free and it's great content. Definitely recommended. Talking of Terraform on SAP BTP, the Terraform exporter for SAP BTP has just seen a new release published. Now, just to remind you, the Terraform exporter for SAP BTP is a way for you to get started with existing resources. We all have existing resources on SAP BTP, right? Anyway, for more details on this update and what it brings, check out Christian blog post.

[Shilpa] Hello, ABAP developers. You might know about CDS external entities, which allows ABAP applications to retrieve data from external system using SQL and make it available within the CDS infrastructure. Now, external system can be SAP HANA or non-SAP HANA data system or remote ASABAP. With the latest release of SAP BTP ABAP environment, 2502, these external entities can be defined as writable. Now, writable external entities can modify the data on the external systems using SQL operations like insert, update, modify, and delete. So in addition to the read-only scenarios, it is possible for the ABAP applications to modify the data on the external system using SQL. Now, writing is only possible via service connection in order to decouple the remote transaction from the local transaction. The syntax and more details is in the help document. I will leave the link in the description.

[Kevin] So one tool I regularly use is the SAP Business Technology Platform Solution Diagram repository. And for those who don't know what I'm talking about, the SAP BTP Solution Diagram repository is a collection of helpful icons, shapes, and other useful tools to easily create beautiful solution diagrams. And they regularly ship updates to that. And right now, we got a new update, allowing you to resize icons, which is great, and they also enhanced the SAP BTP foundational icons with updated SAP Cloud Identity Service icons and more. They added also document grounding to SAP BTP AI and extensibility service for BTP to SAP BTP AppDev Automation. And finally, they also added two new libraries. One is the SAP generic icons.

entry.title: Re: Improved Job Transparency - Job Monitor in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @theofanis_hatzis , 

The QRC1 2025 release will include monitoring capabilities for data action jobs and multi action jobs. If the data import jobs are triggered within Multi Actions, from multi actions monitor, you can also view these data import jobs. Stopping running jobs is not supported in the QRC1 2025 release. 

Sarau

entry.title: Re: Simplify Complex Process: Create Process Hierarchy in SAP Cloud ALM Faster with Spreadsheet Powe
entry.content:
Thanks for a great article. Very helpful.

We are in the process of setting up our Cloud ALM system. My user has required role collections (Process Management Process Hierarchy Author) assigned but in Process Hierarchy screen, there is no option to edit. Create button is not available either. Can you help?

entry.title: Re: Improved Job Transparency - Job Monitor in SAP Analytics Cloud
entry.content:
Hi @Ricardomx , there is a default filter to show "Last 7 Days" jobs. You can check if you have any job started on last 7 days. Or you can also change the filter to show more jobs. 

If you still have this issue after above checks, it's better to create a ticket for us to investigate the cause. 

Sarau

entry.title: Setting default date in smartfilterbar field not working
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am default value for date field in smartfilterbar which is working fine. But when I try to click on F4 searchhelp to replace the date field value, error message is shown in console which doesn't allow me to proceed further. Can someone help me to fix this issue ?

Error message is  {name: 'FormatException', message: 'Illegal sap.ui.model.odata.type.DateTime value: '}

Code that is used in filter initializing method to display default date:

Error in console:

Thanks in advance.

entry.title: Re: SCIM Connector on CIS in BTP trial version
entry.content:
If your third party system supports scim there is a built in api: https://api.sap.com/api/IdDS_SCIM/resource/Users

this is used for provisioning from Entra.

entry.title: Re: Tracking of CO2 emissions in SAP
entry.content:
Thank you, ‘Boogie81’, for posting and pointing out that SFM can post calculated footprints into S/4, other SAP applications, and non-SAP systems. However, this does not address Julie’s question. The footprint in her scenario is already known, and she wants to manage it as a material attribute in SAP ERP.

Your link has triggered another thought worthy of investigation. S/4 2021 and younger provides a Sustainability Integration Component (Scope Item: 5IM—product Footprint Management) that enables the integration of product footprints into purchase requisitions. It should be possible to leverage the Key User Extensibility to access the Sustainability Integration Component for this purpose.

The component is documented here.

Klaus

entry.title: Re: CAP Factory/Facade Pattern with Remote and Local Enti...
entry.content: I would say model the two pieces as aspects. https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/cds/aspects#separate-reuse-aspects

entry.title: How to fix Basic Finish Date on Preventative Work Orders.
entry.content: Issue Example: We have a weekly Preventative Work Order generate on Monday. They have all week to complete it. The work itself takes about 8 hours. The site has tons of weekly work orders and prioritize them based on who is in that day. The Basic Finish Date shows the work order as "past due" within two day. How do I change that to reflect the true time the site has to complete the order? This is the same with our monthly, quarterly, and yearly too.

entry.title: Re: Issue with a Brazil customer for tax jurisdiction code.
entry.content: Could you give more information about the error?

entry.title: Re: how to delete an overdue task in successfactors under...
entry.content: it is beyond 30 days (precisely 92 days)

entry.title: Re: Datasphere trial - domain not trusted
entry.content:
Possible Error Messages:
"Your domain is not trusted. Please contact your system administrator."
"Your request has failed because the page you are being redirected to is not trusted. Please contact your system administrator."
Cause:
This issue happens because:

The IAS tenant does not trust the application’s domain.
The browser is blocking necessary cookies.
How to Fix It:
Follow these steps in order:

Add the required domains to the IAS tenant's trust list (see Configure Trusted Domains for details).
Enable third-party cookies in your browser (check your browser's documentation for instructions).
Disable "Prevent cross-site tracking" or "Do Not Track" in your browser settings (names may vary).
Extra Tip for Step 1:
If you check the network trace, you should see a request to a URL like this:
https://<tenant_ID>.accounts.ondemand.com/ui/error/clickjacking?domain=https://performancemanager.successfactors.eu
In this case, you need to add "performancemanager.successfactors.eu" to the trusted list

I BASED IT ON THIS NOTE:2872546 - "Your Domain is not trusted. Please contact your system administrator." when creating a Report - Story - Embedded Edition of People Analytics - SAP for Me

Also attached that document Configure Trusted Domains | SAP Help Portal

 

Best Regads,
David

entry.title: Re: Datasphere trial - domain not trusted
entry.content: DASDASDASDASD

entry.title: Conent Enricher ODataV4 is causing an error - Unbound namespace URI
entry.content:
Dear community,

we are currently running into an error when we want to use the content enricher with ODATA V4. We have following payload as original message:

 

<rpt_transcript xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
  <transcript>
    <start_dt>2024-11-22T08:00:00Z</start_dt>
    <comp_dt xsi:nil="true"/>
    <object_id>819b6e0c-f252-49f2-dc45-a3cc7d4c8829</object_id>
    <t_user_id>0815</t_user_id>
  </transcript>
</rpt_transcript>

 

Here followed the config of the content enricher: 

ODATAV4 enricher config:

And here as an example the XML payload for the payload wich should be enriched (lookup message):

 

    <rpt_user xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance">
      <rpt_user>
        <user_name_first>XXX</user_name_first>
        <user_id>0815</user_id>
        <user_name_last>XXX</user_name_last>
        <user_address2 xsi:nil="true"/>
        <user_address1 xsi:nil="true"/>
        <user_zip xsi:nil="true"/>
        <user_state xsi:nil="true"/>
      </rpt_user>
    </rpt_user>

 

At the moment we are getting following error in CPI:

org.apache.camel.CamelExchangeException: Error occurred during aggregation. Exchange[498134F5CD2FC33-0000000000000003]. Caused by: [com.sap.it.rt.camel.aggregate.exception.AggregationStrategyException - java.lang.IllegalStateException: Exception at getRecordAtCurrentLevelAgainstKey], cause: javax.xml.stream.XMLStreamException: Unbound namespace URI 'http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance'

 

Fore sure the "xmlns:xsi=http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" is already configured in the namespace mapping in the runtime configuration.

Does someone have ideas? 

Thanks

DL

entry.title: How to Upload Files to Document Service and Link Attachments to Leads or Opportunities
entry.content:
In this blog, we'll explore how to upload files to the Document Service in SAP Sales & Service Cloud v2 and link these attachments to Leads or Opportunities. Additionally, we'll discuss how to integrate with SAP Build Apps and automate processes using APIs.

Uploading Files to Document Service

  1. Initiate the Upload Process

    • Make a POST request to the Document Service API with the file name and category.

 

POST https://example.crm.cloud.sap/sap/c4c/api/v1/document-service/documents

{
"isSelected":false,
"isDisplayDocument":true,
"fileName":"sampledocument.pdf",
"category":"DOCUMENT",
"type":"10001"
}​

 

  • It will return 201 status
  • In the response will include with id ,  upload URL and metadata.

  • Upload the File

    • Use the provided upload URL to upload the file via a PUT request. No authentication is required for this step.
    PUT  uploadURL (copy from above response and paste) 

    Select body as Binary file.

  • Verify the Upload (Optional)

    • You can make a GET request to check the status of the uploaded document.
GET https://example.crm.cloud.sap/sap/c4c/api/v1/document-service/document



Linking Attachments to Leads or Opportunities

  1. Retrieve the Attachment ID

    • After uploading, note the attachment ID from the response metadata.

  2. Link the Document to a Lead or Opportunity

    • GET Lead UUID and Etag field
    • Make a PATCH request to link the attachment to the desired entity (Leads or Opportunity).

 

PATCH https://example.crm.cloud.sap/sap/c4c/api/v1/lead-service/leads/<lead uuid>
If-Match: "date field"  

{
   "attachments":
   [
     {
        "id":"d2c125e0-efbf-11ef-b6ec-2df52bbf4c94"
      }
    ]
}​

 

Integrating with SAP Build Apps

  1. Set Up SAP Build Apps

    • Access SAP Build Apps and create a new project.

  2. Connect to SAP Sales & Service Cloud

    • Use REST APIs to connect your app to SAP Sales & Service Cloud. Configure the necessary endpoints and authentication.

  3. Implement File Upload and Linking

    • Integrate the file upload and linking functionality within your app using the APIs shown above.

Automating with APIs

  1. Use SAP Event Mesh or SAP Integration Suite or Power Automate or Similar Tools

    • Tools like Power Automate can help automate the file upload and linking process. Create flows that trigger on specific events (e.g., new lead creation).

  2. API Integration

    • Utilize REST APIs to automate tasks. For example, automate the upload process by triggering a flow when a new document is added to a specific folder.

By following these steps, you can efficiently manage document uploads and link attachments to Leads or Opportunities in SAP Sales & Service Cloud v2. Integrating with SAP Build Apps and automating processes using APIs can further streamline your workflows and enhance productivity.

Feel free to reach out if you have any questions or need further assistance!

entry.title: Hi Learning hub subscription in India is not provided for individual user
entry.content:
Hii there, learning hub subscription in india is not provided for individual user. Is there any way of getting the subcription,since my company is not willing to enroll for training on their payrolls as it is govt owned company it is not easy to implement trainings and requires a lot of approval.

Will you kindly suggest any other way of purchasing the subscription as i am eager to start my SAP learning journey.

Thanks

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Start fails to load App
entry.content: Hi Sascha, Despite the instructions, it still does not work, it is not enough to modify the Semantic Object and the Action, I think the problem is in SAP Mobile Start

entry.title: Re: SAP Mobile Start fails to load App
entry.content:
Hi, everyone.

After reviewing and adjusting the manifest.json, the problem persists.
I think the problem is in SAP Mobile Start, the same apps that worked before, now cannot be opened.

Best regards,

Erick

entry.title: Re: Joule speaks ABAP!
entry.content:
Thanks for sharing @AlexanderRother. But documentation does not apply for my 2023 On Premise System, because the Apps "Communication System" and "Communication Arrangement" don't exist. Neither the SAP Note 3513374 helped me getting these Apps. So am I missing something or is there any new ABAP AI SDK documentation incoming for lower Onprem/Private Release? Because it is stated: "Lower releases of SAP S/4HANA Cloud Private Edition and OnPrem are supported via Transport-based Correction Instructions (TCI)"

Thanks in advanced.

Wang

entry.title: Re: Publish the terminated employees in worksheet to EC
entry.content: Hi @vivekanandanp Product team will fix this in 1H 2025.

entry.title: Re: SAP Investment Management Future State
entry.content:
Please review SAP Note: 2436714 - Investment Management in SAP S/4HANA, private cloud and on-premise edition.

IM isn't being sunsetted, so if it meets your business requirements you can continue to use it.

entry.title: Script giving error about screen mismatch in ME21
entry.content:
I'm working to write a script for ME21, which will take Contract information, and use it to create a Purchase Order.

While testing, I always get the same error "No batch input data found for dynpro (SAPMSSY0 0120) SAPMM06E 0101 .   expected." - it is expecting the Purchase Order creation screen, but is still stuck on the Contract line item selection screen. When I view it screen by screen, the script does GO to SAPMM06E 0101, but it stops because it THINKS that it is on SAPMSSY0 0120. 

Is there any way to make the visible screen match the screen listed in the background?

entry.title: Does SAP support MSSQL as a target database for SLT when the SLT system is running on Linux?
entry.content:
Hello SAP

 

Does SAP support MSSQL as a target database for SLT when the SLT system is running on Linux?

 

SLT version is "SAP LT REPLICATION SERVER 3.0" which is running on NetWeaver 7.52 SP 12 with Linux OS.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Does SAP support MSSQL as a target database for SLT w...
entry.content:
Dear customer,

As per KBA 3574158 - Does SAP support MSSQL as a target database for SLT when the SLT system is running on Linux?

Answer is:

No.

SLT can only support databases that are supported by SAP NetWeaver for either source or target database connections.

This limitation is due to DBSL.

 

When using a DB connection to the target system, the compatibility of SLT with the target system is based on whether its DBSL version supports the target DB version. More information about this in 2737003 - SAP Landscape Transformation Replication Server (SLT): Non ABAP-based Targets.



According to Product Availability Matrix, MSSQL is not compatible with OS Linux. As you can check in the following link https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/pam?hash=s%3Dnetweaver%26filter%3D%26o%3Dmost_viewed%257Cdesc%26st%3Dl%26rpp%3D20%26page%3D1%26pvnr%3D73554900100900000414%26pt%3Dt%257CPLTFRM%26ainstnr%3D73554900104900001064%26fclfilter%3DG2%257CLINUX%2520ON%2520X86_64%253BG2%257CLINUX%2520ON%2520POWER%2520BIG%2520ENDIAN%253BG2%257CLINUX%2520FOR%2520ZSERIES%253BG2%257CLINUX%2520ON%2520POWER%2520LITTLE%2520ENDIAN

SAP Support Launchpad: Sign In you can search for the Netweaver version and check the DBs compatibility in this link https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap(bD1lbiZjPTAwMQ==)/support/pam/pam.html#ts=2
click in "display all product versions" -> search for the NetWeaver version you wanna know -> Technical release information -> database platforms
